scripts.build:token-map: ts-node scripts/generate-token-values.ts mobile && echo '✅ Generated token map from tokens/mobile/global/'
scripts.test:slots: PW_WORKERS=11 SLOT_VERIFY_TARGET=both playwright test tests/token_slot_validation.spec.ts && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:slots:headed: PW_WORKERS=20 SLOT_VERIFY_TARGET=both playwright test tests/token_slot_validation.spec.ts --headed && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:slots:canvas: PW_WORKERS=11 SLOT_VERIFY_TARGET=canvas playwright test tests/token_slot_validation.spec.ts && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:slots:preview: PW_WORKERS=10 SLOT_VERIFY_TARGET=preview playwright test tests/token_slot_validation.spec.ts --headed && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:mobile: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false PLATFORM=android wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts
scripts.test:mobile:bs: RUN_LOCAL=false npm run test:mobile:setup && rm -rf allure-results && PLATFORM=android wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts
scripts.test:mobile:android:bs: rm -rf allure-results && PLATFORM=android wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts
scripts.test:mobile:android:parallel:3: RUN_LOCAL=true PARALLEL_EMULATORS=3 PLATFORM=android wdio run wdio/config/wdio.local.parallel.conf.ts
scripts.test:mobile:ios: rm -rf allure-results && PLATFORM=ios wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.*.spec.ts
scripts.test:mobile:full: npm run test:mobile:setup && npm run test:mobile:android && npm run test:mobile:ios
scripts.test:mobile:new-widgets: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec 'wdio/specs/mobile.{fileupload,calendar,slider,rating,icon,lottie,audio,message,modal}.token.validate.spec.ts'
scripts.test:mobile:new-widgets:android: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false PLATFORM=android wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec 'wdio/specs/mobile.{fileupload,calendar,slider,rating,icon,lottie,audio,message,modal}.token.validate.spec.ts'
scripts.test:mobile:new-widgets:ios: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=ios wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec 'wdio/specs/mobile.{fileupload,calendar,slider,rating,icon,lottie,audio,message,modal}.token.validate.spec.ts'
scripts.test:mobile:fileupload: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.fileupload.token.validate.spec.ts
scripts.test:mobile:calendar: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.calendar.token.validate.spec.ts
scripts.test:mobile:slider: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.slider.token.validate.spec.ts
scripts.test:mobile:rating: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.rating.token.validate.spec.ts
scripts.test:mobile:icon: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.icon.token.validate.spec.ts
scripts.test:mobile:lottie: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.lottie.token.validate.spec.ts

scripts.test:mobile:modal: rm -rf allure-results && RUN_LOCAL=false MOBILE_PLATFORM=both wdio run wdio/config/wdio.browserstack.conf.ts --spec wdio/specs/mobile.modal.token.validate.spec.ts
